lines.en_lit: And if it enters your mind from midnight by Torah law, how do we earlier and how do we later
Rather, Rabbi Yoḥanan said: From that it is stated All night, don’t I know that it until morning? And what does the verse state: Until morning? Add morning to the morning of the night.

Therefore, every day remove the ashes from the altar at the crow of the rooster or adjacent to it, whether before it or after it, sufficient. On Yom Kippur, when, there is the weakness of the High Priest, and we do so from midnight. And on the Festivals, when the Jewish people are numerous and offerings are numerous, and we do so from the first watch, in accordance with the reason that is taught And the call of the rooster would not arrive until the courtyard was full with the Jewish people.
What keriat hagever? Rav said: It is the call of the man; Rabbi Sheila said: It is the call of the rooster,

Rav happened to the place Rabbi Sheila There was no disseminator to stand before Rabbi Sheila Rav stood before him interpreted What keriat hagever? the call of the man. Rabbi Sheila said to him: And let the Master say the call of the rooster. said to him, A flute for noblemen music, but weavers, receive no from it,

When I stood before Rabbi Ḥiyya and interpreted: What keriat hagever? the call of the man, he did not say anything to me and you, say to me: Say the call of the rooster. He said to him: Is the Master Rav? Let the Master rest said to him: People say If you hired yourself to him, comb his wool. Some say, this is what said to him: One elevates in sanctity and one does not downgrade.

was taught in accordance with of Rav, was taught in accordance with of Rabbi Sheila. was taught in accordance with of Rav: What did Gevini Crier, say Arise, priests, to your service, and Levites to your platform, and Israelites to your watch. And His voice was be heard at three parasangs,

an incident involving King Agrippa, who was coming down the road and heard voice at a distance of three parasangs. And when came to his house he sent gifts to him, And even so, High Priest superior to his, as the Master said: And already was Please God, and his voice was heard in Jericho. And Rabba bar bar Ḥana said Rabbi Yoḥanan said: from Jerusalem to Jericho ten parasangs.
here, there is the weakness there, there is no the weakness of And here it was day, and there it was night

As Rabbi Levi said: Why is a person’s voice not heard during the day in the manner that it is during the night? due to sphere of the sun traversing the sky like a carpenter sawing cedars, And that sawdust the day la is its name. This is Nebuchadnezzar said: “And all the inhabitants of the world are considered like la”

the Sages taught: Were it not sphere of the sun, sound of the crowds of Rome heard and were it not for the sound of the crowds of Rome, the sound of the sun’s sphere heard the Sages taught: Three sounds travel from the end of the world to its end, and these are: The sound of the sphere of the sun, and sound of the crowds of Rome, and the sound of the soul at the moment that it leaves the body, And some say: Even birth.
